plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: Think. Build. Ship. Combats your worst instincts as a founder/engineer — gut checks, scope checks, honest reviews.

plugins.name: nutmeg
plugins.description: Football data analytics toolkit. Acquire, wrangle, compute, analyse, visualise, and learn across Opta, StatsBomb, Wyscout, SportMonks, FPL, and free sources. Includes a searchable MCP docs server, 11 skills, and 3 agents.

plugins.name: sharpen
plugins.description: Pressure-test your tweets before posting. Simulates Twitter, HN, and Reddit reactions, then helps you tighten up.
